title: Pillars of Creation
credit: NASA, ESA, CSA, STScI; J. DePasquale, A. Koekemoer, A. Pagan (STScI)
description: Towering pillars of gas and dust in the Eagle Nebula, where new stars are being born.

title: Hubble Ultra Deep Field
credit: NASA, ESA, S. Beckwith (STScI) and the HUDF Team
description: Nearly 10,000 galaxies of various ages, sizes, shapes, and colors in a tiny patch of sky.

title: Pale Blue Dot
description: Earth seen from Voyager 1, 3.7 billion miles away — a mote of dust suspended in a sunbeam.
